title: [regression #113 build] Inverted full adder output when use -ha option.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
**Original test:** 
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys-tests/tree/master/simple/full_adder

**Test case:**
module top
(
 input x,
 input y,
 input cin,

 output A,
 output cout
 );

assign {cout,A} =  cin + y + x;

endmodule

**script:**
read_verilog ../top.v
proc
synth -top top
extract_fa -ha -v
tee -o result.log dump
synth -top top
write_verilog synth.v


## Expected behavior

'A' shouldn't be inverted.

## Actual behavior

output 'A' has an inverted behavior.
